Docs.summary: The OS configuration of Linux machine.

MemberSignature.Value: public string MessageOfTheDay { get; set; }
.property instance string MessageOfTheDay
Public Property MessageOfTheDay As String
member this.MessageOfTheDay : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Message of the day for Linux nodes, base64-encoded. A base64-encoded string which will be written to /etc/motd after decoding. This allows customization of the message of the day for Linux nodes. It must not be specified for Windows nodes. It must be a static string (i.e., will be printed raw and not be executed as a script).
